summary: Validated that validators are ALREADY wired into pulse.py tick loop - no code changes needed

test_bad_deposit.description: Created deposit with stub code (pass, raise NotImplementedError)

findings: The validator wiring was ALREADY COMPLETE in pulse.py
run_validators() function (lines 354-500) already calls both validator scripts
tick() function (line 680) already calls run_validators() for each deposit
Config toggles work: validation.enabled, code_validator_enabled, llm_filter_enabled
Failed deposits get status='failed' with failure_reason and validation details in meta.json
SMS notifications sent on validation failures
Lessons logged via pulse_learnings.py for failures
notes_for_orchestrator: NO CODE CHANGES WERE NEEDED. The brief described work that was already completed in a prior build. The validators were fully wired before this Drop started. Verified by creating test builds with good and bad deposits - validation correctly passes/rejects them. Minor deprecation warnings exist in pulse_code_validator.py (datetime.utcnow()) but don't affect functionality.
